business.name: Countrywide Plumbing
business.tagline: 24/7 Emergency Service • No Job Too Small

hero.headline: *Emergency Plumbing* Solutions When Houston Needs Them Most
hero.subheadline: Licensed master plumbers available 24/7 for burst pipes, sewer backups, and gas line emergencies. Same-day service guaranteed across Greater Houston.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Complete Plumbing Solutions
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to major installations, we handle every plumbing need

services.title: Emergency Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Burst pipes, sewer backups, and gas leaks don't wait. Our emergency team responds within 60 minutes to minimize damage and restore your plumbing fast.

services.title: Water Heater Installation & Repair
services.description: Complete water heater services including tankless upgrades, traditional replacements, and emergency repairs. All major brands serviced with warranty.

services.title: Sewer Line & Gas Line Work
services.description: Professional sewer line installation, repairs, and gas line installations. Licensed for all residential and commercial gas work with safety inspections.

services.title: Copper Re-piping & Upgrades
services.description: Complete copper re-piping services for older homes. Replace galvanized pipes with modern copper or PEX for better water pressure and quality.

services.title: Toilet & Fixture Repairs
services.description: Fast toilet repairs, garbage disposal installations, and all plumbing fixture services. No job too small - we handle everything from leaks to full replacements.

about.heading: Houston's Most Reliable Plumbing Team
about.body: For over 15 years, Countrywide Plumbing has served Houston families and businesses with honest, professional plumbing services. Our licensed master plumbers believe no job is too small, from simple toilet repairs to complex sewer line installations. Available 24/7 for emergencies.

reviews.name: Maria L.
reviews.text: Called at 2am with a burst pipe flooding my kitchen. Tech arrived in 45 minutes, fixed everything, and helped with insurance paperwork. Saved my hardwood floors!

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: Replaced our 20-year-old water heater with a tankless unit. Fair pricing, clean work, explained everything. Been working perfectly for 8 months now.

reviews.name: Jennifer M.
reviews.text: Gas line installation for our new outdoor kitchen. Permits, inspections, everything handled professionally. Other companies wouldn't even quote such a small job.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Houston
service_areas.subheading: Emergency and scheduled plumbing services throughout the Houston metro area

cta.heading: Need Plumbing Help Right Now?
cta.body: Don't let plumbing problems get worse. Our licensed technicians are standing by 24/7 for emergencies, or schedule convenient service for non-urgent repairs.
